{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
  Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen:
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>gro√ü 8v√≤.</FORMAT>
    <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR>
    <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>
    <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>
    <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Anf√§ng der Geographie</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8v√≤.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Gespr√§ch von den W√ºrmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE>
    <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1. Fixed a nesting error where the 'Memoires de Rochester' BIBL tag was not closed before the 'Maupertuis' BIBL tag began. 2. Corrected a typo in the tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency across the document. 3. Removed redundant 'in' and 'von' text from inside the structured tags to maintain data purity. 4. Ensured all BIBL elements are properly closed and balanced."}

parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed a nesting error where the 'Memoires de Rochester' BIBL tag was not closed before the 'Maupertuis' BIBL tag began. 2. Corrected a typo in the tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency across the document. 3. Removed redundant 'in' and 'von' text from inside the structured tags to maintain data purity. 4. Ensured all BIBL elements are properly closed and balanced.
